get.description: Returns activity logs for a specific project and environment, sorted by `createdAt` in descending order (most recent first). Use the `createdAt` filter for pagination.

schema.description: The **case sensitive** environment name
The **case sensitive** project name
This specifies a limit on the number of objects to return, ranging between 1 and 100. Limit is set to 10 by default
The user email
The user id
The team name
The collection name (same as in the schema).
The record id
The action performed
The type of the activity log
Value to filter by
Maximum value to filter by (exclusive). This filter supports date-time values in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM), e.g., 2024-06-04T09:21:26.159Z.
Minimum value to filter by (inclusive). This filter supports date-time values in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM), e.g., 2024-06-04T09:21:26.159Z.

collection.description: The collection the activity log is related to

inbox.description: The inbox the activity log is related to, if the activity has been done in the context of an inbox

runId.description: ID corresponding to a single run of the workflow

stepName.description: The name of the step within the workflow

optionName.description: The name of the option selected on the step within the workflow

workflow.description: The workflow the activity log is related to

team.description: The team the activity log is related to
